---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new idea for chroma-flow
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem. e.g. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

What you'd like chroma-flow to do, and why.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or prior art that help explain the idea.

## Would you like to work on this?

- [ ] I'd like to implement this myself (a maintainer will help you get started).
